summary: Iteration 82: AI Avatar Generator with game-level integration - All features tested and working. Backend APIs (generate-avatar, my-avatar, my-avatars, set-active-avatar) all pass validation. Frontend Avatar Creator page loads with dual tabs (AI Manifestation + Energy Builder), all UI elements present and functional. Global avatar display working in Navigation bar and Dashboard greeting area.
seed_data_creation: None - test user already has 2 AI-generated avatars in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 tests AI Avatar Generator feature. All 4 backend endpoints working: POST /api/ai-visuals/generate-avatar (accepts {description, style, extras}, returns 400 for empty description), GET /api/ai-visuals/my-avatar (returns active avatar with image_b64), GET /api/ai-visuals/my-avatars (returns gallery array), POST /api/ai-visuals/set-active-avatar (accepts {created_at}). Frontend Avatar Creator page (/avatar) has dual tabs: 'AI Manifestation' (AI generation with description, 4 style cards, Advanced Options with elements/spirit animals/sacred geometry/aura colors) and 'Energy Builder' (canvas-based manual builder with body type, aura, pose, robe, glow, particles). Global avatar display working in Navigation bar profile button and Dashboard greeting area. Test user has 2 avatars in gallery.

backend_apis: POST /api/ai-visuals/generate-avatar - endpoint exists and accepts valid schema
GET /api/ai-visuals/my-avatar - returns active avatar with image_b64, style, description
GET /api/ai-visuals/my-avatars - returns gallery array with 2 avatars
POST /api/ai-visuals/set-active-avatar - successfully sets avatar as active
All 4 endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)
frontend_ui: Avatar Creator page (/avatar) loads with data-testid='avatar-creator-page'
Two tabs present: 'AI Manifestation' and 'Energy Builder'
AI tab shows description textarea with placeholder
AI tab shows 4 style cards: Ethereal, Stylized, Realistic, Abstract
AI tab shows Advanced Options toggle
AI tab shows Manifest Avatar button
Advanced Options expands to show: Elemental Affinity (Fire, Water, Air, Earth, Spirit)
Advanced Options shows Spirit Animal Guardian (Wolf, Eagle, Owl, etc.)
Advanced Options shows Sacred Geometry (Flower of Life, Metatrons Cube, etc.)
Advanced Options shows Aura Color selection (10 colors)
Active avatar displayed with 'ACTIVE AVATAR' badge
Avatar gallery shows 2 past avatars ('YOUR MANIFESTATIONS (2)')
Energy Builder tab shows canvas-based avatar preview
Energy Builder shows Body Type, Aura Color, Aura Intensity, Pose, Robe Style, Glow Style, Particle Density options
Energy Builder shows Save Avatar button
Energy Builder shows Energy Field meter (50%, Neutral, Solar Plexus Chakra)
Navigation bar shows avatar image in profile button (top right)
Dashboard shows avatar in greeting area next to 'Welcome back, Test'
